heading: Definitions
label: 1811 Definitions
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1811 was renumbered .section 3711 of this title

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–419, title IV, § 401(g)114 Stat. 1861Nov. 1, 2000“(1)Except as provided in paragraph (2), the amendments made by this section [enacting this subchapter and subchapter III of this chapter, amending sections 1802 and 1805 of this title, and repealing sections 1801 and 1806 of this title] shall take effect on the first day of the first month beginning more than one year after the date of the enactment of this Act [].Nov. 1, 2000“(2)The Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall identify birth defects under , United States Code (as added by subsection (a) of this section), and shall prescribe the regulations required by subchapter II of chapter 18 of that title (as so added), not later than the effective date specified in paragraph (1).”section 1812 of title 38

children.label: A
children.text: is the child (as defined in ) of a woman Vietnam veteran; andsection 1831(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: was born with one or more covered birth defects.
The term “covered birth defect” means a birth defect identified by the Secretary under .section 1812 of this title
